title: Add structured logging to contact enforcement flow

title: Add WSL/Windows path canonicalization utility
description:
Create canonicalize_project_identifier() in utils.py:
- Normalize slashes: \ -> /
- Normalize drive letters: C: -> c:
- Convert WSL mount: /mnt/c/foo -> c:/foo
- Convert Windows: C:\foo -> c:/foo
- Collapse repeated /, trim whitespace

Files: src/mcp_agent_mail/utils.py
Risk: LOW (pure function, well-tested)
close_reason: Added canonicalize_project_identifier() in utils.py lines 177-239. Handles WSL/Windows path equivalence with lowercase drive, forward slashes, no trailing slashes.

- Log fallback hits for migration visibility

Files: src/mcp_agent_mail/app.py

close_reason: Integrated canonicalize_project_identifier() into _get_project_by_identifier() in app.py lines 1423-1526. Two-pass lookup: canonical first, legacy fallback with migration logging.

title: Narrow exception handling in auto-handshake path

close_reason: Narrowed exception handling: replaced broad 'except Exception: pass' with specific catches for NoResultFound (DB lookups), OperationalError (DB connection issues), and ToolExecutionError (handshake failures). All caught exceptions now logged at appropriate levels.

title: Add unit tests for path canonicalization
description:
Add comprehensive tests for canonicalize_project_identifier():
- /mnt/c/foo/bar -> c:/foo/bar
- C:\foo\bar -> c:/foo/bar
- c:/foo/bar -> c:/foo/bar (already canonical)
- /mnt/d/WORKSPACES -> d:/WORKSPACES
- Mixed slashes: C:/foo\bar -> c:/foo/bar
- Edge cases: empty, whitespace, non-path identifiers

Files: tests/test_utils.py (or new file)
Risk: LOW
close_reason: Created tests/test_utils_canonicalize.py with 21 test cases covering WSL paths, Windows paths, Linux passthrough, edge cases, and equivalence tests.
